title: conyza laxiflora
intro: Conyza laxiflora, also known as Horseweed or False Flax, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as colds, coughs, and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Conyza laxiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and soothe digestive issues. Conyza laxiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
